title: Gouania tomentosa
taxonomy: Gouania tomentosa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae, commonly known as the buckthorn or coffeeberry family. It belongs to the genus Gouania, a group of plants that are primarily found in tropical regions of the world. The classification of Gouania tomentosa is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Rosids, Order: Rosales, Family: Rhamnaceae, Genus: Gouania, Species: G. tomentosa. This classification indicates its close relationship with other plants in the Rhamnaceae family. The specific classification of Gouania tomentosa helps scientists understand its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.
